item.title: Automating IPAM in Cloud: Ansible + Netbox
item.description: A few months back, I was asked to put together a short demonstration on how I would automate IP Address Management (IPAM) in Microsoft Azure as new environments are spun up. If you are hybrid multi-cloud, it probably means you are sharing the same RFC1918 space across clouds and traditional networking. If this is the case, it means you probably want to keep track of allocation across VNets, Subnets, and VMs.

item.title: About
item.description: William Collins is a Lead Cloud Architect working for a Fortune 100 company. Over his career he has designed large-scale networks, driven modernization through cloud adoption, and looks to constantly optimize through good design practices and automation. His most recent work has been hybrid multi-cloud focused in Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Alkira Cloud, and Platform Equinix. Outside of tech his time is spent with family, woodworking, ice hockey, and classical guitar.
